title: salix eriostachya var. lineariloba
intro: Salix eriostachya var. lineariloba, also known as the linear-leaved willow, is a variant of the willow plant species that is native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Salix eriostachya var. lineariloba include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Salix eriostachya var. lineariloba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
